overview: Modern, high-converting website for AI Academy — a computer training institute in Nimbahera, Rajasthan. Features 4 pages (Home, Courses, Gallery, About) with a blue/white design, sticky nav, floating WhatsApp button, and mobile-friendly layout designed to attract students and boost enrollments.
features: Hero section with 'Learn Skills. Build Career.' headline and dual CTAs
Courses page with RSCIT, Tally, Basic Computer, and AI Basics course cards
Gallery/Vlog page with grid of class and activity placeholders
About page with founder profile, mission, and contact details
Sticky header with mobile hamburger menu
